overall.description: A first-person walk through a GTA V-inspired Los Santos urban environment during golden hour. The player walks along sidewalks, crosses intersections, and traverses an elevated walkway while observing moderate traffic including cars, buses, and a military truck, with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with neon signage and downtown view

events.description: dark SUV drives past on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk approaching intersection, passing the Los Santos neon sign

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving along the street parallel to sidewalk

entered.detail: large red neon sign mounted on tree trunk reading 'Los Santos'
black metal fence running along left side of sidewalk
cluster of tall modern glass and steel buildings forming the city skyline
tall palm tree with visible trunk and fronds

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk in an urban area during golden hour, with a prominent red 'Los Santos' neon sign on the left and the downtown skyline visible ahead. A chain-link fence runs along the left side while palm trees and street lamps line the path.

events.description: steps off sidewalk and enters the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane road
white convertible sports car drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, then turning left to follow the road direction

notable_agents.action: white convertible driving through the intersection
pedestrian crossing the street from the opposite direction

entered.detail: white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
single-story commercial building with flat roof and large windows
tall pole with traffic signal lights and pedestrian crossing signals

segments.scene_description: Crossing a multi-lane intersection via the crosswalk, turning left as a white convertible passes by. The scene opens up from the enclosed sidewalk to the wide intersection with traffic lights and commercial buildings visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with concrete railing alongside arterial road

events.description: turns onto elevated walkway with concrete railing on the right side
city bus passes by on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated sidewalk next to busy traffic, passing street lamps and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: yellow-topped concrete barrier wall separating sidewalk from drop
contemporary building with large glass facade and geometric design
wooden utility pole with electrical transformers and wires

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway with a protective railing on the right, overlooking a busy multi-lane road. Modern glass buildings line the left side while the downtown skyline remains visible in the distance. Various trucks and buses pass by on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with car dealership and multiple crossing pedestrians

events.description: enters crosswalk to cross the wide intersection near the car dealership
motorcycle and several cars navigate through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, navigating around other pedestrians and waiting for vehicles to clear

notable_agents.action: man talking on cell phone while crossing the street

entered.detail: modern two-story car dealership with glass showroom and vehicles on display
multi-story red brick industrial building with large windows

segments.scene_description: Crossing a busy urban intersection with a prominent car dealership visible ahead. Multiple vehicles including a motorcycle navigate the intersection while pedestrians cross in various directions. The scene transitions from the elevated walkway to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to industrial brick warehouse with security fencing

events.description: steps onto sidewalk next to brick industrial building with chain-link fencing
large military cargo truck drives past on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a tall brick wall and fence, observing traffic including a passing military truck

notable_agents.action: military cargo truck with camouflage pattern driving along the street

entered.detail: tall red brick warehouse building with multiple windows and industrial appearance
security fence with barbed wire topping running along the brick building

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrower sidewalk bordered by a tall brick industrial building with security fencing on the right. The area feels more enclosed compared to previous segments. A large military truck passes by on the road to the left, and the downtown skyline is visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sun-drenched urban landscape that shifts from open commercial intersections to a confined industrial corridor. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a red Los Santos neon sign, moving past palm trees and chain-link fences toward the distant downtown skyline. As the camera crosses a wide multi-lane intersection and passes a white convertible, the view opens up before ascending onto an elevated walkway flanked by modern glass buildings and overlooking a stream of buses and trucks. The scene then descends back to street level to navigate a busy crossing near a car dealership filled with motorcycles and pedestrians, before finally turning into a narrower path bordered by a tall brick industrial building and security fencing as a large military truck passes by.
